closest_to_intersection: Which option describes the street object closest to the center of the intersection?
Choose the option for the street object nearest the intersection center.
Using the ground positions, which option describes the object nearest to the middle of the intersection?
Which option describes the object closest to where the roads meet?
Among the candidate street objects, which option is closest to the intersection center?
same_road_arm_as_reference: Which option describes the street object on the same road arm as the red-boxed object?
Choose the option for the street object on the same road arm as the red-boxed object.
Which option describes the object placed along the same road arm as the red-boxed object?
Using the road arms, which option describes the object that shares the same road arm as the red-boxed object?
Among the candidate street objects, which option is on the same road arm as the red-boxed object?
ahead_along_lane: Using the red arrow as the travel direction, which option describes the street object directly ahead of the red-boxed object if it continues along its lane?
Which option describes the object directly ahead of the red-boxed object along the lane indicated by the red arrow?
Follow the red-boxed object's red direction arrow along its lane. Which option describes the street object directly ahead?
If the red-boxed object keeps moving in the red-arrow direction along its lane, which option describes the object directly ahead?
Among the candidate street objects, which option is ahead of the red-boxed object in the lane shown by the red arrow?

global.object_description: a perspective street intersection or T intersection with roads, sidewalks, crosswalk markings, street context, candidate street objects, and a text option panel below the scene
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter
global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the selected street object in the scene

task:street_same_road_arm_reference_quer.object_description: a perspective street intersection or T intersection with roads, sidewalks, crosswalk markings, street context, one red-boxed reference street object, candidate street objects, and a text option panel below the scene

task:street_lane_ahead_object_query.object_description: a perspective street intersection or T intersection with roads, sidewalks, crosswalk markings, street context, one red-boxed reference street object with a red travel-direction arrow, candidate street objects, and a text option panel below the scene
